questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在將應用程式從該公司管理的本機 Microsoft Active Directory 遷移到 AWS。該公司在多個 AWS 帳戶中部署應用程式。該公司使用 AWS Organizations 集中管理帳戶。該公司的安全團隊需要跨公司所有 AWS 帳戶的單一登入解決方案。本公司必須繼續管理本機 Active Directory 中的使用者和群組。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is migrating applications from an on-premises Microsoft Active Directory that the company manages to AWS. The company deploys the applications in multiple AWS accounts. The company uses AWS Organizations to manage the accounts centrally. The company's security team needs a single sign-on solution across all the company's AWS accounts. The company must continue to manage users and groups that are in the on-premises Active Directory. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在 AWS Directory Service for Microsoft Active Directory 中建立企業版 Active Directory。將 Active Directory 設定為 AWS IAM Identity Center 的識別來源。
A.en: Create an Enterprise Edition Active Directory in AWS Directory Service for Microsoft Active Directory. Configure the Active Directory to be the identity source for AWS IAM Identity Center.

B.zh: 啟用 AWS IAM Identity Center。使用 AWS Directory Service for Microsoft Active Directory 設定雙向林信任關係，以將公司的自我管理 Active Directory 與 IAM Identity Center 連線。
B.en: Enable AWS IAM Identity Center. Configure a two-way forest trust relationship to connect the company's self-managed Active Directory with IAM Identity Center by using AWS Directory Service for Microsoft Active Directory.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Directory Service 並與本公司自行管理的 Active Directory 建立雙向信任關係。
C.en: Use AWS Directory Service and create a two-way trust relationship with the company's self-managed Active Directory.

D.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 上部署身分提供者 (IdP)。將 IdP 連結為 AWS IAM Identity Center 中的身分來源。
D.en: Deploy an identity provider (IdP) on Amazon EC2. Link the IdP as an identity source within AWS IAM Identity Center.

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項建議在 AWS 中建立新的 Active Directory，但問題需要繼續使用現有的本機 Active Directory。此選項不會解決與現有 Active Directory 的整合問題。
A.en: Incorrect. This option recommends creating a new Active Directory in AWS, but the question requires continuing to use the existing on-premises Active Directory. This option does not address integration with existing Active Directory.

B.zh: 正確。此選項直接解決透過雙向林信任關係將現有本機 Active Directory 與 AWS IAM Identity Center 整合的問題需求。這種方法允許繼續使用現有使用者和群組，同時啟用跨帳戶的單一登入。
B.en: Correct. This option directly addresses the question requirement to integrate existing on-premises Active Directory with AWS IAM Identity Center through a bidirectional forest trust relationship. This approach allows existing users and groups to continue to be used while enabling single sign-on across accounts.

C.zh: 錯誤。雖然提到了雙向信任關係，但沒有提到與 AWS IAM Identity Center 的整合。此選項缺少單一登入解決方案的具體說明。
C.en: Incorrect. Although a two-way trust relationship is mentioned, there is no mention of integration with AWS IAM Identity Center. This option lacks specific instructions for a single sign-on solution.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項建議在 EC2 上部署新的 IdP，但問題需要繼續使用現有的本機 Active Directory。這種方法增加了複雜性，並且不符合問題所需的最佳實踐。
D.en: Incorrect. This option recommends deploying a new IdP on EC2, but the question requires continuing to use the existing on-premises Active Directory. This approach adds complexity and does not meet the best practices required by the question.

answer_text.zh: B. 啟用 AWS IAM Identity Center。使用 AWS Directory Service for Microsoft Active Directory 設定雙向林信任關係，以將公司的自我管理 Active Directory 與 IAM Identity Center 連線。
answer_text.en: B. Enable AWS IAM Identity Center. Configure a two-way forest trust relationship to connect the company's self-managed Active Directory with IAM Identity Center by using AWS Directory Service for Microsoft Active Directory.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項直接解決透過雙向林信任關係將現有本機 Active Directory 與 AWS IAM Identity Center 整合的問題需求。這種方法允許繼續使用現有使用者和群組，同時啟用跨帳戶的單一登入。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option directly addresses the question requirement to integrate existing on-premises Active Directory with AWS IAM Identity Center through a bidirectional forest trust relationship. This approach allows existing users and groups to continue to be used while enabling single sign-on across accounts.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司計劃在 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL Serverless v2 叢集上部署其應用程式。該應用程式將收到大量流量。該公司希望隨著應用程式負載的增加來優化叢集的儲存效能。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is planning to deploy its application on an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL Serverless v2 cluster. The application will receive large amounts of traffic. The company wants to optimize the storage performance of the cluster as the load on the application increases. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 將叢集配置為使用 Aurora 標準儲存配置。
A.en: Configure the cluster to use the Aurora Standard storage configuration.

B.zh: 將叢集儲存類型配置為預先配置 IOPS。
B.en: Configure the cluster storage type as Provisioned IOPS.

C.zh: 將叢集儲存類型配置為通用。
C.en: Configure the cluster storage type as General Purpose.

D.zh: 配置叢集以使用 Aurora I/O-Optimized 儲存配置。
D.en: Configure the cluster to use the Aurora I/O-Optimized storage configuration.

A.zh: 錯誤。Aurora 標準是預設儲存配置，但它可能無法在重負載下提供最佳效能。雖然成本較低，但不適合需要高效能儲存的場景。
A.en: Incorrect. Aurora Standard is the default storage configuration, but it may not provide optimal performance under heavy load. Although the cost is low, it is not suitable for scenarios that require high-performance storage.

B.zh: 錯誤。預先配置 IOPS 提供高效能存儲，但價格較高，且不是最具成本效益的解決方案。適合需要極高IOPS的場景，但Aurora Serverless v2一般不需要此配置。
B.en: Incorrect. Provisioned IOPS provides high-performance storage, but is more expensive and is not the most cost-effective solution. Suitable for scenarios requiring extremely high IOPS, but Aurora Serverless v2 generally does not require this configuration.

C.zh: 錯誤。通用儲存類型適合中等效能需求，但可能無法滿足重負載下的效能要求。成本較低，但不如 Aurora I/O-Optimized。
C.en: Incorrect. The General Purpose storage type is suitable for moderate performance needs, but may not meet performance requirements under heavy load. Lower cost, but not as good as Aurora I/O-Optimized.

D.zh: 正確。Aurora I/O-Optimized 是專為高效能和高負載場景設計的儲存配置。它消除了 I/O 請求成本，同時提供更高的效能，是最具成本效益的解決方案。
D.en: Correct. Aurora I/O-Optimized is a storage configuration specifically designed for high-performance and high-load scenarios. It eliminates I/O request costs while providing higher performance and is the most cost-effective solution.

answer_text.zh: D. 配置叢集以使用 Aurora I/O-Optimized 儲存配置。
answer_text.en: D. Configure the cluster to use the Aurora I/O-Optimized storage configuration.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (81%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Aurora I/O-Optimized 是專為高效能和高負載場景設計的儲存配置。它消除了 I/O 請求成本，同時提供更高的效能，是最具成本效益的解決方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (81%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Aurora I/O-Optimized is a storage configuration specifically designed for high-performance and high-load scenarios. It eliminates I/O request costs while providing higher performance and is the most cost-effective solution.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家在 AWS 上運作的金融服務公司已設計其安全控制來滿足業界標準。業界標準包括美國國家標準與技術研究院 (NIST) 和支付卡產業資料安全標準 (PCI DSS)。本公司的第三方審核員需要證據證明所設計的控制措施已實施且運作正常。該公司在 AWS Organizations 的單一組織中擁有數百個 AWS 帳戶。公司需要監控跨帳戶控制的當前狀態。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A financial services company that runs on AWS has designed its security controls to meet industry standards. The industry standards include the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) and the Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS). The company's third-party auditors need proof that the designed controls have been implemented and are functioning correctly. The company has hundreds of AWS accounts in a single organization in AWS Organizations. The company needs to monitor the current state of the controls across accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 從組織管理帳戶指定一個帳戶為 Amazon Inspector 委派管理員帳戶。將 Inspector 與組織集成，以發現和掃描所有 AWS 帳戶中的資源。啟用 NIST 和 PCI DSS 的 Inspector 產業標準。
A.en: Designate one account as the Amazon Inspector delegated administrator account from the Organizations management account. Integrate Inspector with Organizations to discover and scan resources across all AWS accounts. Enable Inspector industry standards for NIST and PCI DSS.

B.zh: 從組織管理帳戶指定一個帳戶為 Amazon GuardDuty 委派管理員帳戶。在指定的 GuardDuty 管理員帳戶中，啟用 GuardDuty 來保護所有成員帳戶。啟用 NIST 和 PCI DSS 的 GuardDuty 行業標準。
B.en: Designate one account as the Amazon GuardDuty delegated administrator account from the Organizations management account. In the designated GuardDuty administrator account, enable GuardDuty to protect all member accounts. Enable GuardDuty industry standards for NIST and PCI DSS.

C.zh: 在組織管理帳戶中設定 AWS CloudTrail 組織追蹤。指定一個帳戶作為合規帳戶。在合規帳戶中啟用 NIST 和 PCI DSS 的 CloudTrail 安全標準。
C.en: Configure an AWS CloudTrail organization trail in the Organizations management account. Designate one account as the compliance account. Enable CloudTrail security standards for NIST and PCI DSS in the compliance account.

D.zh: 從組織管理帳戶指定一個帳戶為 AWS Security Hub 委派管理員帳戶。在指定的 Security Hub 管理員帳戶中，為所有成員帳號啟用 Security Hub。啟用 NIST 和 PCI DSS 的 Security Hub 標準。
D.en: Designate one account as the AWS Security Hub delegated administrator account from the Organizations management account. In the designated Security Hub administrator account, enable Security Hub for all member accounts. Enable Security Hub standards for NIST and PCI DSS.

A.zh: 錯誤。主要用於自動化安全評估和漏洞掃描，但它不直接提供NIST和PCI DSS等行業標準的合規性監控。儘管 Inspector 可以發現和掃描資源，但其功能並未完全涵蓋合規性驗證的要求，因此該選項不符合問題要求。錯誤原因：檢查員的職能與問題所要求的合規監控不完全匹配。
A.en: Incorrect. is primarily used for automated security assessments and vulnerability scanning, but it does not directly provide compliance monitoring for industry standards such as NIST and PCI DSS. Although the Inspector can discover and scan resources, its functionality does not fully cover the requirements for compliance verification, so this option does not meet the question requirements. Reason for the error: The functions of the Inspector do not fully match the compliance monitoring required by the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。主要用於威脅檢測和異常行為監控，並不是專門為 NIST 和 PCI DSS 等行業標準的合規性驗證而設計的。 GuardDuty 無法直接提供業界標準的合規性監控，因此此選項不符合問題要求。錯誤原因：GuardDuty 的功能著重於威脅偵測而不是合規驗證。
B.en: Incorrect. is primarily intended for threat detection and anomalous behavior monitoring and is not specifically designed for compliance verification with industry standards such as NIST and PCI DSS. GuardDuty cannot directly provide compliance monitoring to industry standards, so this option does not meet the question requirements. Reason for the error: GuardDuty’s functionality focuses on threat detection rather than compliance verification.

C.zh: 錯誤。主要用於記錄API呼叫和使用者活動日誌，但不直接提供NIST和PCI DSS等業界標準的合規性監控。雖然CloudTrail可以幫助審核活動，但它無法直接驗證安全控制的實作和功能，因此此選項不符合問題要求。錯誤原因：CloudTrail 的功能著重於日誌記錄，而不是合規性驗證。
C.en: Incorrect. is mainly used to record API calls and user activity logs, but it does not directly provide compliance monitoring for industry standards such as NIST and PCI DSS. While CloudTrail can help audit activities, it cannot directly verify the implementation and functionality of security controls, so this option does not meet the question requirements. Reason for the error: CloudTrail's functionality focuses on logging, not compliance verification.

D.zh: 正確。專門設計用於集中管理和監控安全狀況並支援對 NIST 和 PCI DSS 等行業標準的合規性驗證。 Security Hub可以整合來自多個AWS服務的數據，並提供合規性檢查功能，因此完全滿足問題的要求。正確理由：Security Hub 支援業界標準合規性驗證，並提供集中管理多個帳戶安全狀況的能力。
D.en: Correct. Specifically designed to centrally manage and monitor security posture and support compliance verification to industry standards such as NIST and PCI DSS. Security Hub can integrate data from multiple AWS services and provide compliance checking functions, so it fully meets the requirements of the question. Why it’s correct: Security Hub supports industry-standard compliance verification and provides the ability to centrally manage the security posture of multiple accounts.

answer_text.zh: D. 從組織管理帳戶指定一個帳戶為 AWS Security Hub 委派管理員帳戶。在指定的 Security Hub 管理員帳戶中，為所有成員帳號啟用 Security Hub。啟用 NIST 和 PCI DSS 的 Security Hub 標準。
answer_text.en: D. Designate one account as the AWS Security Hub delegated administrator account from the Organizations management account. In the designated Security Hub administrator account, enable Security Hub for all member accounts. Enable Security Hub standards for NIST and PCI DSS.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：專門設計用於集中管理和監控安全狀況並支援對 NIST 和 PCI DSS 等行業標準的合規性驗證。 Security Hub可以整合來自多個AWS服務的數據，並提供合規性檢查功能，因此完全滿足問題的要求。正確理由：Security Hub 支援業界標準合規性驗證，並提供集中管理多個帳戶安全狀況的能力。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Specifically designed to centrally manage and monitor security posture and support compliance verification to industry standards such as NIST and PCI DSS. Security Hub can integrate data from multiple AWS services and provide compliance checking functions, so it fully meets the requirements of the question. Why it’s correct: Security Hub supports industry-standard compliance verification and provides the ability to centrally manage the security posture of multiple accounts.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon S3 儲存桶作為其資料湖儲存平臺。 S3 儲存桶包含大量數據，多個團隊和數百個應用程式隨機存取這些數據。該公司希望降低 S3 儲存成本並為頻繁存取的物件提供即時可用性。滿足這些要求的最高效的營運解決方案是什麼？
question_text.en: A company uses an Amazon S3 bucket as its data lake storage platform. The S3 bucket contains a massive amount of data that is accessed randomly by multiple teams and hundreds of applications. The company wants to reduce the S3 storage costs and provide immediate availability for frequently accessed objects. What is the MOST operationally efficient solution that meets these requirements?

A.zh: 建立 S3 生命週期規則以將物件轉換到 S3 智慧分層儲存類別。
A.en: Create an S3 Lifecycle rule to transition objects to the S3 Intelligent-Tiering storage class.

B.zh: 將物件儲存在 Amazon S3 Glacier 中。使用 S3 Select 為應用程式提供資料存取權限。
B.en: Store objects in Amazon S3 Glacier. Use S3 Select to provide applications with access to the data.

C.zh: 使用 S3 儲存類別分析中的資料建立 S3 生命週期規則，以自動將物件轉換到 S3 標準-不頻繁存取（S3 標準-IA）儲存類別。
C.en: Use data from S3 storage class analysis to create S3 Lifecycle rules to automatically transition objects to the S3 Standard- Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) storage class.

D.zh: 將物件轉換為 S3 標準-不頻繁存取（S3 標準-IA）儲存類別。建立一個 AWS Lambda 函數，以便在應用程式存取物件時將物件轉換為 S3 標準儲存類別。
D.en: Transition objects to the S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) storage class. Create an AWS Lambda function to transition objects to the S3 Standard storage class when they are accessed by an application.

A.zh: 正確。S3智慧分層是一個自動最佳化儲存成本的儲存層，可根據物件的存取模式動態調整儲存層，無需人工幹預。它支援頻繁存取和不頻繁存取的對象，並提供即時可用性，非常適合隨機存取場景。
A.en: Correct. S3 Intelligent-Tiering is a storage layer that automatically optimizes storage costs and can dynamically adjust the storage layer based on the access pattern of the object without manual intervention. It supports frequently accessed and infrequently accessed objects and provides instant availability, making it ideal for random access scenarios.

B.zh: 錯誤。S3 Glacier 主要用於長期存儲，存取延遲較高，不適合需要立即可用的場景。 S3 Select的無條帶連接提供了對資料的即時訪問，操作複雜，條帶不足以實現高效率。
B.en: Incorrect. S3 Glacier is mainly used for long-term storage, with high access latency and is not suitable for scenarios that require immediate availability. S3 Select's stripless connection provides instant access to data, and the operation is complex, and stripes are not sufficient to achieve high efficiency.

C.zh: 錯誤。S3 Standard-IA適用於不經常訪問的對象，但對於經常訪問的對象會產生額外的訪問成本。需要手動分析、儲存差異化資料並建立規則，運作效率低，不符合問題作為「最具運作效率」的解決方案的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. S3 Standard-IA is suitable for objects that are not frequently accessed, but additional access costs will be incurred for frequently accessed objects. It is necessary to manually analyze and store differentiated data and create rules, which has low operational efficiency and does not meet the requirements of the problem as the "most operationally efficient" solution.

D.zh: 錯誤。此方法需要額外的 AWS Lambda 函數來控制和管理物件的儲存分類，從而增加了操作複雜度。 Stripless會自動優化儲存成本，頻繁存取的物件會產生額外的存取成本。
D.en: Incorrect. This method requires additional AWS Lambda functions to control and manage the storage classification of objects, increasing operational complexity. Stripless automatically optimizes storage costs, and frequently accessed objects will incur additional access costs.

answer_text.zh: A. 建立 S3 生命週期規則以將物件轉換到 S3 智慧分層儲存類別。
answer_text.en: A. Create an S3 Lifecycle rule to transition objects to the S3 Intelligent-Tiering storage class.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：S3智慧分層是一個自動最佳化儲存成本的儲存層，可根據物件的存取模式動態調整儲存層，無需人工幹預。它支援頻繁存取和不頻繁存取的對象，並提供即時可用性，非常適合隨機存取場景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: S3 Intelligent-Tiering is a storage layer that automatically optimizes storage costs and can dynamically adjust the storage layer based on the access pattern of the object without manual intervention. It supports frequently accessed and infrequently accessed objects and provides instant availability, making it ideal for random access scenarios.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司擁有 5 TB 的資料集。該資料集包含 100 萬個使用者個人資料和 1,000 萬個連線。使用者設定檔具有多對多關係的連線。該公司需要一種高效的方式來找到最多五個層級的相互聯繫。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has 5 TB of datasets. The datasets consist of 1 million user profiles and 10 million connections. The user profiles have connections as many-to-many relationships. The company needs a performance efficient way to find mutual connections up to five levels. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 儲存桶儲存資料集。使用 Amazon Athena 執行 SQL JOIN 查詢來尋找連線。
A.en: Use an Amazon S3 bucket to store the datasets. Use Amazon Athena to perform SQL JOIN queries to find connections.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon Neptune 儲存具有邊和頂點的資料集。查詢資料以找到聯絡人。
B.en: Use Amazon Neptune to store the datasets with edges and vertices. Query the data to find connections.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 儲存桶來儲存資料集。使用 Amazon QuickSight 視覺化連線。
C.en: Use an Amazon S3 bucket to store the datasets. Use Amazon QuickSight to visualize connections.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon RDS 儲存具有多個資料表的資料集。執行 SQL JOIN 查詢以尋找連線。
D.en: Use Amazon RDS to store the datasets with multiple tables. Perform SQL JOIN queries to find connections.

A.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon S3 和 Amazon Athena Amazon S3 是一種物件儲存服務，適合儲存靜態數據，但不適合處理複雜的關係查詢。 Amazon Athena 是一種互動式查詢服務，適用於結構化資料的 SQL 查詢。但對於多層關係查詢（例如圖資料的五層連接），效能效率較低。所以。
A.en: Incorrect. Using Amazon S3 and Amazon Athena Amazon S3 is an object storage service that is suitable for storing static data, but is not suitable for processing complex relational queries. Amazon Athena is an interactive query service that is suitable for SQL queries on structured data. However, for multi-layer relational queries (such as five-layer joins of graph data), the performance efficiency is low. Therefore.

B.zh: 正確。使用 Amazon Neptune Amazon Neptune 是專門設計的圖形資料庫，支援圖形資料的儲存和查詢。它可以有效率地處理複雜的圖查詢，例如多層關係（五層連接）。這個選項是正確的。
B.en: Correct. Using Amazon Neptune Amazon Neptune is a specially designed graph database that supports the storage and query of graph data. It can efficiently handle complex graph queries such as multi-layer relationships (five-layer joins). This option is correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon S3 和 Amazon QuickSight Amazon QuickSight 是資料視覺化服務，適合顯示數據，但不適合執行複雜的關聯查詢。此選項不正確，因為它不符合五層連接高效查詢的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Using Amazon S3 and Amazon QuickSight Amazon QuickSight is a data visualization service suitable for displaying data, but not suitable for performing complex relational queries. This option is incorrect because it does not meet the requirements for performance-efficient querying of Layer 5 connections.

D.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon RDS Amazon RDS 是一種關聯式資料庫服務，適合儲存結構化資料和執行 SQL 查詢。雖然可以透過SQL JOIN查詢實現多層關係，但效能效率較低，尤其是在處理圖資料時。
D.en: Incorrect. Using Amazon RDS Amazon RDS is a relational database service suitable for storing structured data and executing SQL queries. Although multi-layer relationships can be implemented through SQL JOIN queries, the performance is less efficient, especially when processing graph data.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 Amazon Neptune 儲存具有邊和頂點的資料集。查詢資料以找到聯絡人。
answer_text.en: B. Use Amazon Neptune to store the datasets with edges and vertices. Query the data to find connections.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：使用 Amazon Neptune Amazon Neptune 是專門設計的圖形資料庫，支援圖形資料的儲存和查詢。它可以有效率地處理複雜的圖查詢，例如多層關係（五層連接）。這個選項是正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Using Amazon Neptune Amazon Neptune is a specially designed graph database that supports the storage and query of graph data. It can efficiently handle complex graph queries such as multi-layer relationships (five-layer joins). This option is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司需要在其本地環境和 AWS 之間建立安全連線。此連接不需要高頻寬，並且將處理少量流量。應快速建立連線。建立這種類型的連結最經濟有效的方法是什麼？
question_text.en: A company needs a secure connection between its on-premises environment and AWS. This connection does not need high bandwidth and will handle a small amount of traffic. The connection should be set up quickly. What is the MOST cost-effective method to establish this type of connection?

A.zh: 實作客戶端 VPN。
A.en: Implement a client VPN.

B.zh: 實作 AWS Direct Connect。
B.en: Implement AWS Direct Connect.

C.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 上實作堡壘主機。
C.en: Implement a bastion host on Amazon EC2.

D.zh: 實作 AWS 站對站 VPN 連線。
D.en: Implement an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection.

A.zh: 錯誤。。客戶端VPN主要用於用戶設備與AWS資源之間的安全連接，適合遠端用戶訪問，而不是用於將整個本地環境與AWS連接。不符合問題所要求的「連接本地環境和AWS」的場景。
A.en: Incorrect. . Client VPN is mainly used for secure connections between user devices and AWS resources, suitable for remote user access, rather than for connecting the entire local environment with AWS. It does not meet the scenario of "connecting the local environment and AWS" required by the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。。 AWS Direct Connect 提供專用的高頻寬連接，適合需要穩定、高速連接的場景。但搭建時間長、成本高，不符合題主「搭建快」、「成本低」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. . AWS Direct Connect provides a dedicated high-bandwidth connection, which is suitable for scenarios that require stable and high-speed connections. However, the setup time is long and the cost is high, which does not meet the "quick setup" and "low cost" requirements of the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。。 Bastion Host 用於安全地管理對 EC2 執行個體的訪問，而不是將本機環境連接到 AWS。不適合題目要求的場景。
C.en: Incorrect. . Bastion Host is used to securely manage access to EC2 instances, rather than connecting your local environment to AWS. It is not suitable for the scenario required by the question.

D.zh: 正確。。 AWS Site-to-Site VPN 連線設定快速、成本低廉、適合處理少量流量，並且可以安全地將本地環境連接到 AWS 資源。
D.en: Correct. . AWS Site-to-Site VPN connections are quick to set up, are low-cost, are suitable for handling light traffic, and can securely connect local environments to AWS resources.

answer_text.zh: D. 實作 AWS 站對站 VPN 連線。
answer_text.en: D. Implement an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：。 AWS Site-to-Site VPN 連線設定快速、成本低廉、適合處理少量流量，並且可以安全地將本地環境連接到 AWS 資源。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: . AWS Site-to-Site VPN connections are quick to set up, are low-cost, are suitable for handling light traffic, and can securely connect local environments to AWS resources.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司擁有本地 SFTP 檔案傳輸解決方案。該公司正在遷移到 AWS 雲，以擴展檔案傳輸解決方案並使用 Amazon S3 優化成本。該公司的員工將使用其本地 Microsoft Active Directory (AD) 的憑證來存取新解決方案。該公司希望保留目前的身份驗證和文件存取機制。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an on-premises SFTP file transfer solution. The company is migrating to the AWS Cloud to scale the file transfer solution and to optimize costs by using Amazon S3. The company's employees will use their credentials for the on-premises Microsoft Active Directory (AD) to access the new solution. The company wants to keep the current authentication and file access mechanisms. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 設定 S3 檔案閘道。在檔案閘道上建立使用現有 Active Directory 進行驗證的 SMB 檔案共用。
A.en: Configure an S3 File Gateway. Create SMB file shares on the file gateway that use the existing Active Directory to authenticate.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體設定 Auto Scaling 群組以執行 SFTP 解決方案。將群組配置為以 60% CPU 使用率擴展。
B.en: Configure an Auto Scaling group with Amazon EC2 instances to run an SFTP solution. Configure the group to scale up at 60% CPU utilization.

C.zh: 使用 SFTP 終端節點建立 AWS Transfer Family 伺服器。選擇 AWS Directory Service 選項作為身分提供者。使用 AD Connector 連線本機 Active Directory。
C.en: Create an AWS Transfer Family server with SFTP endpoints. Choose the AWS Directory Service option as the identity provider. Use AD Connector to connect the on-premises Active Directory.

D.zh: 建立 AWS Transfer Family SFTP 終端節點。配置終端節點以使用 AWS Directory Service 選項作為身分提供者來連接到現有的 Active Directory。
D.en: Create an AWS Transfer Family SFTP endpoint. Configure the endpoint to use the AWS Directory Service option as the identity provider to connect to the existing Active Directory.

A.zh: 錯誤。設定 S3 檔案閘道。在使用現有 Active Directory 進行驗證的檔案閘道上建立 SMB 檔案共用。分析：S3檔案閘道主要用於將本機檔案系統匯出至Amazon S3，但不支援SFTP協定。問題需要使用SFTP進行檔案傳輸，而不是SMB檔案共用。該選項不符合題目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Configure an S3 File Gateway. Create an SMB file share on the file gateway that uses existing Active Directory for authentication. Analysis: S3 File Gateway is mainly used to export local file systems to Amazon S3, but it does not support the SFTP protocol. The question requires the use of SFTP for file transfer, not SMB file sharing. This option does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體設定 Auto Scaling 群組以執行 SFTP 解決方案。將群組配置為在 CPU 使用率達到 60% 時進行擴展。分析：使用EC2執行個體執行SFTP解決方案需要對伺服器進行自我管理，包括SFTP服務的安裝、設定和維護。此選項增加了營運開銷，並且不符合「最小營運開銷」的要求。雖然可以實現SFTP功能，但這並不是最好的解決方案。
B.en: Incorrect. Configure an Auto Scaling group with Amazon EC2 instances to run the SFTP solution. Configure the group to scale when CPU utilization reaches 60%. Analysis: Using EC2 instances to run SFTP solutions requires self-management of the server, including installation, configuration, and maintenance of SFTP services. This option increases operational overhead and does not meet the requirement of "minimum operational overhead". Although the SFTP function can be implemented, it is not the best solution.

C.zh: 正確。建立具有 SFTP 終端節點的 AWS Transfer Family 伺服器。選擇 AWS Directory Service 選項作為身分提供者。使用 AD Connector 連線到本機 Active Directory。分析：AWS Transfer Family支援SFTP協議，可以直接與AWS Directory Service對接。 AD Connector可用於將AWS連接到本機Active Directory，以滿足問題所需的身份認證機制。此選項完全滿足題型要求，且運行開銷較低。
C.en: Correct. Create an AWS Transfer Family server with an SFTP endpoint. Select the AWS Directory Service option as the identity provider. Use AD Connector to connect to on-premises Active Directory. Analysis: AWS Transfer Family supports the SFTP protocol and can interface directly with AWS Directory Service. AD Connector can be used to connect AWS to local Active Directory to meet the identity authentication mechanism required by the question. This option fully meets the question requirements and has low operational overhead.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項分析：此選項與C非常相似，但沒有明確提到使用AD Connector連接到本地Active Directory。如果沒有 AD Connector，AWS Directory Service 就無法直接與本機 Active Directory 連線。此選項缺乏相關訊息，無法滿足題幹的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Create an AWS Transfer Family SFTP endpoint. Configure the endpoint to use the AWS Directory Service option as the identity provider to connect to your existing Active Directory. Analysis: This option is very similar to C, but does not explicitly mention using AD Connector to connect to the local Active Directory. Without AD Connector, AWS Directory Service cannot interface directly with on-premises Active Directory. This option lacks relevant information and cannot meet the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 SFTP 終端節點建立 AWS Transfer Family 伺服器。選擇 AWS Directory Service 選項作為身分提供者。使用 AD Connector 連線本機 Active Directory。
answer_text.en: C. Create an AWS Transfer Family server with SFTP endpoints. Choose the AWS Directory Service option as the identity provider. Use AD Connector to connect the on-premises Active Directory.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：建立具有 SFTP 終端節點的 AWS Transfer Family 伺服器。選擇 AWS Directory Service 選項作為身分提供者。使用 AD Connector 連線到本機 Active Directory。分析：AWS Transfer Family支援SFTP協議，可以直接與AWS Directory Service對接。 AD Connector可用於將AWS連接到本機Active Directory，以滿足問題所需的身份認證機制。此選項完全滿足題型要求，且運行開銷較低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Create an AWS Transfer Family server with an SFTP endpoint. Select the AWS Directory Service option as the identity provider. Use AD Connector to connect to on-premises Active Directory. Analysis: AWS Transfer Family supports the SFTP protocol and can interface directly with AWS Directory Service. AD Connector can be used to connect AWS to local Active Directory to meet the identity authentication mechanism required by the question. This option fully meets the question requirements and has low operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在設計一個事件驅動的訂單處理系統。每個訂單在創建後都需要多個驗證步驟。冪等 AWS Lambda 函數執行每個驗證步驟。每個驗證步驟都獨立於其他驗證步驟。各個驗證步驟僅需要訂單事件資訊的子集。該公司希望確保 Lambda 函數的每個驗證步驟只能存取該函數所需的訂單事件中的資訊。訂單處理系統的組件應該是鬆散耦合的，以適應未來的業務變化。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is designing an event-driven order processing system. Each order requires multiple validation steps after the order is created. An idempotent AWS Lambda function performs each validation step. Each validation step is independent from the other validation steps. Individual validation steps need only a subset of the order event information. The company wants to ensure that each validation step Lambda function has access to only the information from the order event that the function requires. The components of the order processing system should be loosely coupled to accommodate future business changes. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 為每個驗證步驟建立一個 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列。建立一個新的 Lambda 函數，將訂單資料轉換為每個驗證步驟所需的格式，並將訊息發佈到適當的 SQS 佇列。將每個驗證步驟 Lambda 函數訂閱到其對應的 SQS 佇列。
A.en: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue for each validation step. Create a new Lambda function to transform the order data to the format that each validation step requires and to publish the messages to the appropriate SQS queues. Subscribe each validation step Lambda function to its corresponding SQS queue.

B.zh: 建立 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主題。將驗證步驟 Lambda 函數訂閱到 SNS 主題。使用訊息正文過濾僅將所需的資料傳送到每個訂閱的 Lambda 函數。
B.en: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the validation step Lambda functions to the SNS topic. Use message body filtering to send only the required data to each subscribed Lambda function.

C.zh: 建立 Amazon EventBridge 事件匯流排。為每個驗證步驟建立事件規則。配置輸入轉換器以僅將所需的資料傳送至每個目標驗證步驟 Lambda 函數。
C.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge event bus. Create an event rule for each validation step. Configure the input transformer to send only the required data to each target validation step Lambda function.

D.zh: 建立 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列。建立一個新的 Lambda 函數來訂閱 SQS 佇列並將訂單資料轉換為每個驗證步驟所需的格式。使用新的 Lambda 函數在單獨的執行緒上並行執行驗證步驟 Lambda 函數的同步呼叫。
D.en: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Create a new Lambda function to subscribe to the SQS queue and to transform the order data to the format that each validation step requires. Use the new Lambda function to perform synchronous invocations of the validation step Lambda functions in parallel on separate threads.

A.zh: 錯誤。分析：SQS可以實現列的解耦，每個列可以獨立處理不同的軸驗證步驟。缺點：需要建立額外的Lambda函數來轉換資料格式並將資料傳送到列，這增加了複雜性。 SQS 不支援直接查詢功能，這可確保每個 Lambda 函數僅接收所需的資料。此選項不符合問題「確保 Lambda 函數的每個步驟僅接收所需的資料」的條件。
A.en: Incorrect. Analysis: SQS can realize the decoupling of columns, and each column can handle different axis verification steps independently. Disadvantage: You need to create an additional Lambda function to convert the data format and send the data to the column, which increases the complexity. SQS does not support direct query function, which ensures that each Lambda function only receives the required data.this option does not meet the condition of the question "Ensure that each step of the Lambda function only receives the required data".

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：SNS支援廣播，可以傳送訊息給多個訂閱者。 SNS支援網路管理，可以根據網路中儲存的資料向訂閱者發送客製化的資料。 SNS的處理功能相對有限，可能無法完全滿足複雜的輸入轉換需求。 SNS的設計更適合廣播場景，而不是聳人聽聞的事件的精確數據傳輸。這個選項足夠了，但不如EventBridge靈活。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: SNS supports broadcasting and can send messages to multiple subscribers. SNS supports network management, and can send customized data to subscribers based on the data stored in the network. The processing function of SNS is relatively limited and may not fully meet the complex input conversion needs. The design of SNS is more suitable for broadcast scenarios, rather than the precise data transmission of sensational events.this option are adequate, but not as flexible as EventBridge.

C.zh: 正確。分析：EventBridge支援事件驅動架構，可根據規則將事件路由到不同的目標。 EventBridge的輸入轉換器可以準確地定義和轉換數據，確保每個Lambda函數只接收所需的數據。 EventBridge被設計為鬆散耦合系統，易於擴展以適應未來的業務變化。此選項完全滿足問題的要求，是最佳選擇。
C.en: Correct. Analysis: EventBridge supports event-driven architecture, which can route events to different targets according to rules. EventBridge's input converter can accurately define and convert data, ensuring that each Lambda function only receives the required data. EventBridge is designed as a loosely coupled system and is easy to expand to adapt to future business changes.this option fully meets the requirements of the question and is the best choice.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：SQS可以實現列的解耦。您需要建立額外的Lambda函數來轉換資料格式並同步呼叫其他Lambda函數，這增加了複雜性。同步呼叫的方法不符合事件感知架構的設計原則，可能會導致效能故障。此選項不符合問題的「鬆散耦合設計」和「事件驅動架構」原則。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: SQS can achieve decoupling of columns. You need to create an additional Lambda function to convert the data format and call other Lambda functions synchronously, which increases complexity. The method of synchronous calling does not comply with the design principles of the event-sensing architecture and may lead to performance failures.this option does not comply with the "loosely coupled design" and "event-driven architecture" principles of the question.

answer_text.zh: C. 建立 Amazon EventBridge 事件匯流排。為每個驗證步驟建立事件規則。配置輸入轉換器以僅將所需的資料傳送至每個目標驗證步驟 Lambda 函數。
answer_text.en: C. Create an Amazon EventBridge event bus. Create an event rule for each validation step. Configure the input transformer to send only the required data to each target validation step Lambda function.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (94%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：EventBridge支援事件驅動架構，可根據規則將事件路由到不同的目標。 EventBridge的輸入轉換器可以準確地定義和轉換數據，確保每個Lambda函數只接收所需的數據。 EventBridge被設計為鬆散耦合系統，易於擴展以適應未來的業務變化。此選項完全滿足問題的要求，是最佳選擇。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (94%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: EventBridge supports event-driven architecture, which can route events to different targets according to rules. EventBridge's input converter can accurately define and convert data, ensuring that each Lambda function only receives the required data. EventBridge is designed as a loosely coupled system and is easy to expand to adapt to future business changes.this option fully meets the requirements of the question and is the best choice.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在將三層應用程式遷移到 AWS。該應用程式需要 MySQL 資料庫。過去，應用程式使用者在建立新條目時報告應用程式效能不佳。這些效能問題是由於用戶在工作時間從應用程式產生不同的即時報告所引起的。當應用程式遷移到 AWS 時，哪種解決方案可以提高應用程式的效能？
question_text.en: A company is migrating a three-tier application to AWS. The application requires a MySQL database. In the past, the application users reported poor application performance when creating new entries. These performance issues were caused by users generating different real-time reports from the application during working hours. Which solution will improve the performance of the application when it is moved to AWS?

A.zh: 將資料匯入具有預先配置容量的 Amazon DynamoDB 表中。重構應用程式以使用 DynamoDB 產生報表。
A.en: Import the data into an Amazon DynamoDB table with provisioned capacity. Refactor the application to use DynamoDB for reports.

B.zh: 在運算最佳化的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上建立資料庫。確保計算資源超過本地資料庫。
B.en: Create the database on a compute optimized Amazon EC2 instance. Ensure compute resources exceed the on-premises database.

C.zh: 建立具有多個唯讀副本的 Amazon Aurora MySQL 多可用區資料庫叢集。配置應用程式以使用讀取器端點來產生報告。
C.en: Create an Amazon Aurora MySQL Multi-AZ DB cluster with multiple read replicas. Configure the application to use the reader endpoint for reports.

D.zh: 建立 Amazon Aurora MySQL 多可用區資料庫叢集。配置應用程式以使用叢集的備份實例作為報表的端點。
D.en: Create an Amazon Aurora MySQL Multi-AZ DB cluster. Configure the application to use the backup instance of the cluster as an endpoint for the reports.

A.zh: 錯誤。原因：雖然DynamoDB是高效能NoSQL資料庫，但問題明確要求使用MySQL資料庫，而MySQL資料庫不是NoSQL資料庫。將資料遷移到DynamoDB並重構應用程式會增加開發成本，並且不符合問題的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Reason: Although DynamoDB is a high-performance NoSQL database, the question clearly requires the use of MySQL database, which is not a NoSQL database. Migrating data to DynamoDB and refactoring the application will increase development costs and does not meet the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。原因：雖然使用泡罩優化的EC2實例可以提高效能，但這種方式缺乏資料庫的高可用性和讀寫分離能力。標題提到效能問題主要是報表產生帶來的讀取操作壓力所造成的。該方案並不能有效解決問題。
B.en: Incorrect. Reason: Although using blister-optimized EC2 instances can improve performance, this approach lacks the high availability and read-write separation capabilities of the database. The title mentioned that the performance problem is mainly caused by the read operation pressure caused by report generation. This solution cannot effectively solve the problem.

C.zh: 正確。原因：Amazon Aurora 支援多可用區架構和唯讀副本，可以透過讀寫分離來提高效能。將報表產生的讀取操作定向到唯讀副本（讀取端點），可以有效減輕主庫的壓力，解決效能問題。
C.en: Correct. Reason: Amazon Aurora supports Multi-AZ architecture and read replicas, which can improve performance through read and write separation. Directing the read operations generated by the report to the read replica (reader endpoint) can effectively reduce the pressure on the primary database and solve performance problems.

D.zh: 錯誤。原因：多可用區的備份實例用於故障轉移，不適合處理讀取作業。備份實例不能用作讀取點，因此該選項不正確。
D.en: Incorrect. Reason: The backup instance of Multi-AZ is used for failover and is not suitable for processing read operations. Backup instances cannot be used as read points, so this option is incorrect.

answer_text.zh: C. 建立具有多個唯讀副本的 Amazon Aurora MySQL 多可用區資料庫叢集。配置應用程式以使用讀取器端點來產生報告。
answer_text.en: C. Create an Amazon Aurora MySQL Multi-AZ DB cluster with multiple read replicas. Configure the application to use the reader endpoint for reports.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：原因：Amazon Aurora 支援多可用區架構和唯讀副本，可以透過讀寫分離來提高效能。將報表產生的讀取操作定向到唯讀副本（讀取端點），可以有效減輕主庫的壓力，解決效能問題。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Reason: Amazon Aurora supports Multi-AZ architecture and read replicas, which can improve performance through read and write separation. Directing the read operations generated by the report to the read replica (reader endpoint) can effectively reduce the pressure on the primary database and solve performance problems.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS Direct Connect 連線將安全的本地網路擴展到 AWS 雲端。本地網路無法直接存取網際網路。在本機網路上執行的應用程式需要使用 Amazon S3 儲存桶。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is expanding a secure on-premises network to the AWS Cloud by using an AWS Direct Connect connection. The on- premises network has no direct internet access. An application that runs on the on-premises network needs to use an Amazon S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 建立公共虛擬介面 (VIF)。透過公用 VIF 路由 AWS 流量。
A.en: Create a public virtual interface (VIF). Route the AWS traffic over the public VIF.

B.zh: 建立 VPC 和 NAT 閘道。將 AWS 流量從本機網路路由到 NAT 閘道。
B.en: Create a VPC and a NAT gateway. Route the AWS traffic from the on-premises network to the NAT gateway.

C.zh: 建立 VPC 和 Amazon S3 介面終端節點。將 AWS 流量從本機網路路由到 S3 介面終端節點。
C.en: Create a VPC and an Amazon S3 interface endpoint. Route the AWS traffic from the on-premises network to the S3 interface endpoint.

D.zh: 在本機網路和 Direct Connect 之間建立 VPC 對等連線。透過對等連接路由 AWS 流量。
D.en: Create a VPC peering connection between the on-premises network and Direct Connect. Route the AWS traffic over the peering connection.

A.zh: 錯誤。公用 VIF 允許 Direct Connect 存取公用 AWS 服務（例如 S3），但這需要啟用 Internet 路由，且問題明確指出「本機網路沒有直接 Internet 存取權限」。另外，公共VIF的流量安全性不夠，可能達不到問題中的「安全」要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Public VIF allows Direct Connect to access public AWS services (such as S3), but this requires enabling Internet routing, and the question clearly states that "the local network does not have direct Internet access." In addition, the traffic of public VIF is not secure enough and may not meet the "security" requirements in the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。NAT 閘道用於將專用網路流量路由至 Internet，但問題明確指出本機網路無法直接存取 Internet。使用NAT網關會增加額外的成本（NAT網關的使用費），不符合「性價比最高」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. A NAT gateway is used to route private network traffic to the Internet, but the question clearly states that the local network does not have direct Internet access. Using a NAT gateway will add additional costs (the usage fee of the NAT gateway) and does not meet the "most cost-effective" requirement.

C.zh: 正確。Amazon S3 介面終端節點允許專用網路直接存取 S3，而無需專用網路。這種方法滿足問題中「安全」和「最具成本效益」的要求，因為介面端點流量是透過AWS私有網路傳輸的，並且沒有額外的NAT網關費用。
C.en: Correct. The Amazon S3 Interface Endpoint allows a private network to directly access S3 without the need for a private network. This method meets the "secure" and "most cost-effective" requirements in the question because the interface endpoint traffic is transmitted over the AWS private network and there are no additional NAT gateway fees.

D.zh: 錯誤。VPC 對等用於連接兩個 VPC，而不是連接本地網路和 AWS 資源。 Direct Connect 本身已經提供了連接本機網路和 AWS 的功能，因此不需要額外的 VPC 對等互連。
D.en: Incorrect. VPC Peering is used to connect two VPCs, not to connect the local network and AWS resources. Direct Connect itself already provides the function of connecting the local network and AWS, so there is no need for additional VPC peering.

answer_text.zh: C. 建立 VPC 和 Amazon S3 介面終端節點。將 AWS 流量從本機網路路由到 S3 介面終端節點。
answer_text.en: C. Create a VPC and an Amazon S3 interface endpoint. Route the AWS traffic from the on-premises network to the S3 interface endpoint.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (68%)； A (32%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon S3 介面終端節點允許專用網路直接存取 S3，而無需專用網路。這種方法滿足問題中「安全」和「最具成本效益」的要求，因為介面端點流量是透過AWS私有網路傳輸的，並且沒有額外的NAT網關費用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (68%); A (32%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The Amazon S3 Interface Endpoint allows a private network to directly access S3 without the need for a private network. This method meets the "secure" and "most cost-effective" requirements in the question because the interface endpoint traffic is transmitted over the AWS private network and there are no additional NAT gateway fees.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司透過在單一 AWS 區域中使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體的 Auto Scaling 群組為其網站提供服務。該網站不需要資料庫。公司正在擴張，公司的工程團隊將網站部署到第二個區域。該公司希望在兩個區域之間分配流量，以適應成長和災難復原目的。此解決方案不應為來自網站運作狀況不佳的區域的流量提供服務。公司應該使用哪些政策或資源來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company serves its website by using an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances in a single AWS Region. The website does not require a database. The company is expanding, and the company's engineering team deploys the website to a second Region. The company wants to distribute traffic across both Regions to accommodate growth and for disaster recovery purposes. The solution should not serve traffic from a Region in which the website is unhealthy. Which policy or resource should the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon Route 53 簡單路由策略
A.en: An Amazon Route 53 simple routing policy

B.zh: Amazon Route 53 多值應答路由策略
B.en: An Amazon Route 53 multivalue answer routing policy

C.zh: 一個區域中的應用程式負載平衡器，其目標群組指定來自兩個區域的 EC2 執行個體 ID
C.en: An Application Load Balancer in one Region with a target group that specifies the EC2 instance IDs from both Regions

D.zh: 一個區域中的應用程式負載平衡器，其目標群組指定來自兩個區域的 EC2 執行個體的 IP 位址
D.en: An Application Load Balancer in one Region with a target group that specifies the IP addresses of the EC2 instances from both Regions

A.zh: 錯誤。分析：單純的路由策略無法實現跨區域的流量分發，且不支援健康檢查功能。因此無法滿足問題中「分發流量」和「健康檢查」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Analysis: A simple routing policy cannot achieve cross-region traffic distribution and does not support the health check function. Therefore, it cannot meet the requirements of "distributing traffic" and "health check" in the question.

B.zh: 正確。分析：多值應答路由策略支援跨區域流量分發，可結合健康檢查功能，確保流量不分送到不健康區域。這完全符合題主的要求。
B.en: Correct. Analysis: The multi-value answer routing policy supports cross-region traffic distribution and can be combined with the health check function to ensure that traffic is not distributed to unhealthy areas. This fully meets the requirements of the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。分析：應用程式負載平衡器無法跨區域工作。它只能在單一區域內分配流量，因此無法滿足問題中的跨區域流量分配要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Application Load Balancer cannot work across regions. It can only distribute traffic within a single area, so it cannot meet the cross-region traffic distribution requirements in the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：雖然可以透過IP位址指定跨區域目標，但負載平衡器仍然無法跨區域工作。此外，這種配置很複雜，且不支援健康檢查功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Although cross-region targets can be specified by IP address, the Application Load Balancer still does not work across regions. Additionally, this configuration is complex and does not support health checking functionality.

answer_text.zh: B. Amazon Route 53 多值應答路由策略
answer_text.en: B. An Amazon Route 53 multivalue answer routing policy

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：多值應答路由策略支援跨區域流量分發，可結合健康檢查功能，確保流量不分送到不健康區域。這完全符合題主的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: The multi-value answer routing policy supports cross-region traffic distribution and can be combined with the health check function to ensure that traffic is not distributed to unhealthy areas. This fully meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 支援的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行其應用程式。 EC2 執行個體運行最新的 Amazon Linux 版本。當公司員工儲存和檢索 25 GB 或更大的檔案時，應用程式會遇到可用性問題。該公司需要一種不需要公司在 EC2 執行個體之間傳輸檔案的解決方案。這些檔案必須在多個 EC2 執行個體和多個可用區中可用。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs its applications on Amazon EC2 instances that are backed by Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS). The EC2 instances run the most recent Amazon Linux release. The applications are experiencing availability issues when the company's employees store and retrieve files that are 25 GB or larger. The company needs a solution that does not require the company to transfer files between EC2 instances. The files must be available across many EC2 instances and across multiple Availability Zones. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將所有檔案移轉到 Amazon S3 儲存桶。指示員工存取 S3 儲存桶中的文件。
A.en: Migrate all the files to an Amazon S3 bucket. Instruct the employees to access the files from the S3 bucket.

B.zh: 拍攝現有 EBS 磁碟區的快照。將快照掛載為跨 EC2 執行個體的 EBS 磁碟區。指示員工從 EC2 執行個體存取文件。
B.en: Take a snapshot of the existing EBS volume. Mount the snapshot as an EBS volume across the EC2 instances. Instruct the employees to access the files from the EC2 instances.

C.zh: 跨所有 EC2 執行個體掛載 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。指示員工從 EC2 執行個體存取文件。
C.en: Mount an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system across all the EC2 instances. Instruct the employees to access the files from the EC2 instances.

D.zh: 從 EC2 執行個體建立 Amazon 系統映像 (AMI)。從 AMI 設定使用執行個體儲存磁碟區的新 EC2 執行個體。指示員工從 EC2 執行個體存取文件。
D.en: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) from the EC2 instances. Configure new EC2 instances from the AMI that use an instance store volume. Instruct the employees to access the files from the EC2 instances.

A.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：Amazon S3是一種適合儲存和檢索檔案的物件儲存服務，但它不支援檔案系統掛載，不能直接用作EC2實例上的共用檔案系統。錯誤原因：問題要求檔案必須在多個EC2實例和多個可用區之間共用。但S3不支援檔案系統掛載，無法滿足此要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Amazon S3 is an object storage service suitable for storing and retrieving files, but it does not support file system mounting and cannot be used directly as a shared file system on EC2 instances. Reason for the error: The question requires that the file must be shared across multiple EC2 instances and multiple availability zones. However, S3 does not support file system mounting and cannot meet this requirement.

B.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：EBS是區塊儲存服務，支援掛載單一EC2實例，但不支援跨多個實例共用。錯誤原因：問題要求檔案必須跨多個EC2執行個體共享，且EBS磁碟區不能同時掛載到多個執行個體。
B.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: EBS is a block storage service that supports mounting a single EC2 instance, but does not support sharing across multiple instances. Reason for the error: The question requires that the file must be shared across multiple EC2 instances, and EBS volumes cannot be mounted to multiple instances at the same time.

C.zh: 正確。效能分析：Amazon EFS 是一種完全託管的檔案儲存服務，支援跨多個 EC2 執行個體和多個可用區的共用檔案系統。 EFS 符合問題所需的所有標準，包括跨多個實例和多個可用區共用檔案儲存。
C.en: Correct. Performance Analysis: Amazon EFS is a fully managed file storage service that supports shared file systems across multiple EC2 instances and multiple Availability Zones. EFS meets all the criteria required by the question, including sharing file storage across multiple instances and multiple Availability Zones.

D.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：實例儲存是暫時存儲，當實例停止或終止時，資料將會遺失。錯誤原因：問題要求檔案必須跨多個EC2實例、多個可用區共享，但實例儲存無法滿足這個要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Instance storage is temporary storage, and data will be lost when the instance is stopped or terminated. Reason for the error: The question requires that the file must be shared across multiple EC2 instances and multiple availability zones, but instance storage cannot meet this requirement.

answer_text.zh: C. 跨所有 EC2 執行個體掛載 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。指示員工從 EC2 執行個體存取文件。
answer_text.en: C. Mount an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system across all the EC2 instances. Instruct the employees to access the files from the EC2 instances.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：效能分析：Amazon EFS 是一種完全託管的檔案儲存服務，支援跨多個 EC2 執行個體和多個可用區的共用檔案系統。 EFS 符合問題所需的所有標準，包括跨多個實例和多個可用區共用檔案儲存。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Performance Analysis: Amazon EFS is a fully managed file storage service that supports shared file systems across multiple EC2 instances and multiple Availability Zones. EFS meets all the criteria required by the question, including sharing file storage across multiple instances and multiple Availability Zones.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 Amazon RDS 資料庫支援的 Amazon EC2 上執行高度敏感的應用程式。合規法規要求對所有個人識別資訊 (PII) 進行靜態加密。解決方案架構師應該推薦哪種解決方案來滿足此要求，同時對基礎架構進行最少的變更？
question_text.en: A company is running a highly sensitive application on Amazon EC2 backed by an Amazon RDS database. Compliance regulations mandate that all personally identifiable information (PII) be encrypted at rest. Which solution should a solutions architect recommend to meet this requirement with the LEAST amount of changes to the infrastructure?

A.zh: 部署 AWS Certificate Manager 以產生憑證。使用證書加密資料庫磁碟區。
A.en: Deploy AWS Certificate Manager to generate certificates. Use the certificates to encrypt the database volume.

B.zh: 部署 AWS CloudHSM、產生加密金鑰並使用這些金鑰加密資料庫磁碟區。
B.en: Deploy AWS CloudHSM, generate encryption keys, and use the keys to encrypt database volumes.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 金鑰配置 SSL 加密以加密資料庫磁碟區。
C.en: Configure SSL encryption using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys to encrypt database volumes.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 金鑰配置 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 加密和 Amazon RDS 加密，以加密執行個體和資料庫磁碟區。
D.en: Configure Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) encryption and Amazon RDS encryption with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys to encrypt instance and database volumes.

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 用於管理 SSL/TLS 證書，這些證書主要用於加密和加密，但不用於加密儲存的資料（例如資料庫磁碟區）。 「加密資料儲存」的要求不符合問題的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) is used to manage SSL/TLS certificates, which are primarily used for encryption and encryption, but not for encrypting stored data (such as database volumes). The requirement of "encrypted data storage" does not meet the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS CloudHSM 是一個用於產生和管理加密金鑰的軟體安全模組，但直接使用 CloudHSM 加密 RDS 資料庫磁碟區需要額外的複雜配置。此選項增加了基礎設施的複雜性，並且不滿足問題所要求的「最小變更」。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS CloudHSM is a software security module used to generate and manage encryption keys, but using CloudHSM directly to encrypt RDS database volumes requires additional complex configuration. This option increases the complexity of the infrastructure and does not meet the "minimum changes" required by the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。SSL 加密用於保護傳輸中資料的安全，不用於加密資料儲存（例如資料庫磁碟區）。此選項混淆了傳輸加密和儲存加密的概念，不符合題中「資料加密儲存」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. SSL encryption is used to protect the security of data in transit and is not used to encrypt data storage (such as database volumes). This option confuses the concepts of transmission encryption and storage encryption, and does not meet the "encrypted data storage" requirement of the question.

D.zh: 正確。Amazon RDS 支援使用 AWS KMS 加密進行加密，確保儲存在資料庫中的資料在某種狀態下加密。 Amazon EBS 也支援使用 AWS KMS 加密進行加密，以確保 EC2 執行個體的儲存磁碟區資料在狀態下進行加密。此選項直接滿足問題要求，並且需要對現有基礎設施進行最小程度的更改。
D.en: Correct. Amazon RDS supports encryption using AWS KMS encryption, ensuring that data stored in the database is encrypted while in a state. Amazon EBS also supports encryption using AWS KMS encryption to ensure that the storage volume data of EC2 instances is encrypted while in state. This option directly meets the question requirements and requires minimal changes to existing infrastructure.

answer_text.zh: D. 使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 金鑰配置 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 加密和 Amazon RDS 加密，以加密執行個體和資料庫磁碟區。
answer_text.en: D. Configure Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) encryption and Amazon RDS encryption with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys to encrypt instance and database volumes.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon RDS 支援使用 AWS KMS 加密進行加密，確保儲存在資料庫中的資料在某種狀態下加密。 Amazon EBS 也支援使用 AWS KMS 加密進行加密，以確保 EC2 執行個體的儲存磁碟區資料在狀態下進行加密。此選項直接滿足問題要求，並且需要對現有基礎設施進行最小程度的更改。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon RDS supports encryption using AWS KMS encryption, ensuring that data stored in the database is encrypted while in a state. Amazon EBS also supports encryption using AWS KMS encryption to ensure that the storage volume data of EC2 instances is encrypted while in state. This option directly meets the question requirements and requires minimal changes to existing infrastructure.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 VPC 的私有子網路中執行 AWS Lambda 函數。子網路具有透過 Amazon EC2 NAT 執行個體到網際網路的預設路由。 Lambda 函數處理輸入資料並將其輸出儲存為物件至 Amazon S3。由於 NAT 實例網路上的流量飽和，Lambda 函數在嘗試上傳物件時會間歇性逾時。該公司希望無需透過網路即可存取 Amazon S3。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs an AWS Lambda function in private subnets in a VPC. The subnets have a default route to the internet through an Amazon EC2 NAT instance. The Lambda function processes input data and saves its output as an object to Amazon S3. Intermittently, the Lambda function times out while trying to upload the object because of saturated traffic on the NAT instance's network. The company wants to access Amazon S3 without traversing the internet. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將 EC2 NAT 執行個體替換為 AWS 託管 NAT 閘道。
A.en: Replace the EC2 NAT instance with an AWS managed NAT gateway.

B.zh: 將 VPC 中的 EC2 NAT 執行個體的大小增加到網路最佳化執行個體類型。
B.en: Increase the size of the EC2 NAT instance in the VPC to a network optimized instance type.

C.zh: 在 VP 中為 Amazon S3 設定閘道終端節點，並對應更新子網路的路由表。
C.en: Provision a gateway endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPUpdate the route tables of the subnets accordingly.

D.zh: 設定中轉網關。將中轉網關連線放置在執行 Lambda 函數的私有子網路中。
D.en: Provision a transit gateway. Place transit gateway attachments in the private subnets where the Lambda function is running.

A.zh: 錯誤。分析：AWS託管的NAT網關確實可以提供更高的效能和可擴充性，並解決網路擁塞的問題。但是，該選項仍然需要對 Amazon S3 進行 Internet 訪問，無法滿足「即時 Internet 存取」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Analysis: AWS-managed NAT gateway can indeed provide higher performance and scalability and solve the problem of network congestion. However, this option still requires Internet access to Amazon S3 and cannot meet the requirement of "instant Internet access".

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：升級EC2 NAT執行個體可以緩解網路擁塞問題，但仍需要Amazon S3能夠上網，無法滿足「即時上網」的需求。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Upgrading EC2 NAT instances can alleviate network congestion problems, but it still requires Internet access to Amazon S3, which cannot meet the requirement of "instant Internet access".

C.zh: 正確。分析：為Amazon S3設定網關端點，流量可以透過AWS網路而不是Internet直接到達S3。這是最好的解決方案，完全滿足問題的要求。
C.en: Correct. Analysis: configures a gateway endpoint for Amazon S3, and traffic can directly reach S3 through the AWS network instead of the Internet. This is the best solution and fully meets the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：Transit Gateway主要用於連接多個VPC到本地網絡，與問題要求的「從網際網路訪問Amazon S3」無關。該選項不適合解決該問題。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Transit Gateway is mainly used to connect multiple VPCs to local networks, and has nothing to do with the question of "accessing Amazon S3 from the Internet" as required by the question. This option is not suitable for solving the problem.

answer_text.zh: C. 在 VP 中為 Amazon S3 設定閘道終端節點，並對應更新子網路的路由表。
answer_text.en: C. Provision a gateway endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPUpdate the route tables of the subnets accordingly.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (92%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：為Amazon S3設定網關端點，流量可以透過AWS網路而不是Internet直接到達S3。這是最好的解決方案，完全滿足問題的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (92%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: configures a gateway endpoint for Amazon S3, and traffic can directly reach S3 through the AWS network instead of the Internet. This is the best solution and fully meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家在世界各地擁有記者的新聞公司正在 AWS 上託管其廣播系統。記者向轉播系統發送現場直播。記者使用手機上的軟體透過即時訊息協定（RTMP）發送即時串流。解決方案架構師必須設計一個解決方案，使記者能夠發送最高品質的串流。此解決方案必須提供返回廣播系統的加速 TCP 連線。解決方案架構師應該使用什麼來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A news company that has reporters all over the world is hosting its broadcast system on AWS. The reporters send live broadcasts to the broadcast system. The reporters use software on their phones to send live streams through the Real Time Messaging Protocol (RTMP). A solutions architect must design a solution that gives the reporters the ability to send the highest quality streams. The solution must provide accelerated TCP connections back to the broadcast system. What should the solutions architect use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 CloudFront
A.en: Amazon CloudFront

B.zh: AWS 全球加速器
B.en: AWS Global Accelerator

C.zh: AWS 用戶端 VPN
C.en: AWS Client VPN

D.zh: Amazon EC2 執行個體與 AWS 彈性 IP 位址
D.en: Amazon EC2 instances and AWS Elastic IP addresses

A.zh: 錯誤。CloudFront 是一項內容傳遞網路 (CDN) 服務，主要用於快取和交付有狀態和動態內容。雖然可以優化內容交付，但不支援RTMP協議，也不提供加速TCP連線的功能。
A.en: Incorrect. CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN) service primarily used for caching and delivering stateful and dynamic content. Although it can optimize content delivery, it does not support the RTMP protocol and does not provide the function of accelerating TCP connections.

B.zh: 正確。是一項網路加速服務，它使用 AWS 全球網路來最佳化 TCP 和 UDP 流量的傳輸速度。非常適合直播等即時應用場景。因此這個選項是正確的。
B.en: Correct. is a network acceleration service that uses the AWS global network to optimize the transmission speed of TCP and UDP traffic. It is ideal for real-time application scenarios such as live streaming. Therefore this option is correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。是一種安全遠端存取解決方案，主要用於與 AWS 資源的加密 VPN 連線。它不適合優化即時串流媒體的 TCP 連線。
C.en: Incorrect. is a secure remote access solution, mainly used for encrypted VPN connections to AWS resources. It is not suitable for optimizing TCP connections for live streaming.

D.zh: 錯誤。EC2執行個體和彈性IP位址可以提供固定的IP位址和運算資源，但它們本身不提供任何網路加速能力，無法在全球範圍內最佳化TCP連線。
D.en: Incorrect. EC2 instances and Elastic IP addresses can provide fixed IP addresses and computing resources, but they do not themselves provide any network acceleration capabilities and cannot optimize TCP connections on a global scale.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (94%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一項網路加速服務，它使用 AWS 全球網路來最佳化 TCP 和 UDP 流量的傳輸速度。非常適合直播等即時應用場景。因此這個選項是正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (94%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a network acceleration service that uses the AWS global network to optimize the transmission speed of TCP and UDP traffic. It is ideal for real-time application scenarios such as live streaming. Therefore this option is correct.
